svg.text: CircuitPython RGB LED Controller — 24V Circuit Diagram
Internal pull-up enabled — buttons wire pin → GND
Fully on at 3.3V gate — no level shifter needed
Add heatsink if strip draws >3A per channel
Holds gate LOW during Arduino boot/reset
Increase to ~5–20 kHz if camera flicker is an issue
24V supply −ve, Arduino GND, all MOSFET sources
must all connect to the same GND bus
Arduino powered from USB; D9–D11 are PWM outputs
